title: Dyschoriste hygrophiloides
taxonomy: Dyschoriste hygrophiloides belongs to the family Acanthaceae, commonly known as the acanthus or thorny flower family. This plant is native to tropical Africa, and its classification is further broken down into the genus Dyschoriste and the species hygrophiloides. As a member of the Acanthaceae family, Dyschoriste hygrophiloides is closely related to other plants in this family, such as Justicia and Thunbergia. The classification of Dyschoriste hygrophiloides is based on its morphological characteristics, including its leaf shape and flower structure. The plant's classification is also influenced by its genetic relationships with other species within the Acanthaceae family.
